feed.title: SAP Community - SAP ERP
feed.subtitle: SAP ERP Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Fixed Assets - Change the base value to the beggining of the first adquisition - MACRS depreciation
entry.content:
Hello SAP community,

I would like to ask if you know how to proceed in the following scenario. At the company where I work, we have a situation where a fixed asset is purchased in year 1, and in year 2 or 3, there is an addition to that fixed asset. They are asking me to start depreciating that addition from year 1, and additionally, to calculate all this under the MACRS depreciation model. Does anyone have any idea how I can configure the depreciation key in this case? The calculation works correctly when I bring the value of the initial acquisition, but when I record the addition, the calculations are no longer correct.

entry.title: MUV not charged to parent item during close out
entry.content:
hi

We just raised multiple ticket regarding unposted MUV-material usage variances not charged to specific parent item during production order closeout. Closeout transaction was not posted also on the inventory audit report.

Hoping you could help us

 

thanks much,

lorie-from Philippines

entry.title: Enter rate/ EUR rate type m for 11.04.2024 in the system settings.
entry.content:
Hi Gurus,

In QM02 Transaction, I am trying to do create return delivery. but when i click on it the above error is popping up. could you please help me to resolve this.

thank you in advance

entry.title: Offline Backup
entry.content:
Hi, In our production system, we've scheduled for one offline backup each week, and a daily online backup. However, encountering issues post the offline backup, such as some locks are not cleared causing disruptions to our operations, prompts us to reconsider the frequency of our offline backups. We aim to determine the best practice for offline backups, whether it should occur weekly, monthly, or quarterly. 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Kanban with production orders: Scheduling of orders
entry.content:
Hello,
We are currently testing the introduction of Kanban with production orders (control type: processing with production orders / preliminary planning with MRP).

We are using a separate order type with production control profile 000001, in which there are no special settings. Orders are scheduled forwards.

The day before yesterday, we set a Kanban card to empty, whereupon a production order was created. However, the scheduling is unclear to us (the start of the FEAUF is on 16.05., the end on 03.06.). Yesterday and today we have again set a Kanban card to empty, again a FEAUF was created. The scheduling of the FEAUFs is exactly the same as for the first one. We don't understand why SAP schedules the production orders in this way. Our expectation would be that the production order takes today's date as the start date.

Can someone help us with this and explain how SAP schedules the dates for this? Or where this can be set?

Thank you very much.

Best regards
Josef

entry.title: FCO-00011 The step start with step key |NW_ABAP_OneHost|ind|ind|ind|ind|0|0|NW_Onehost_System|ind|i
entry.content:
At phase 45 of SAP ECC6 EHP6 installation, i am getting this error message


ERROR 2024-04-18 15:59:08.163
unknown message ID (nw.progress.startupFailed,HLP,DVEBMGS00,STARTING,SHUTDOWN)

FCO-00011 The step start with step key |NW_ABAP_OneHost|ind|ind|ind|ind|0|0|NW_Onehost_System|ind|ind|ind|ind|onehost|0|NW_CI_Instance|ind|ind|ind|ind|ci|0|NW_CI_Instance_Start|ind|ind|ind|ind|start|0|start was executed with status ERROR

entry.title: Additional TO got created with over picked quantity
entry.content:
Warehouse Picker picked the delivery quantities and confirmed TOs but system allowed to create another TO for the quantities which are already picked (Over picked). The goods issue quantity , invoice quantity and the packing slips are matching the delivery quantity which . The over picked quantity is sitting at the shipping area. 

Please advise .

entry.title: Base value key for dep. calculate - ZA
entry.content:
Hi we have seen in the system - transaction AFAMS - in the multi-lve. metho. level under Base. Value 
a Baseline Value ZA = free for modification. 

I see the following info. 

Base value for depreciation calculation.

Along with the standard base values supplied by SAP, you can also use your own base value.  You define this user-specific base value using a customer enhancement (user exit) that has already been set up.

Does anyone have any idea which users already exist here? and where this is maintained?

many thanks

entry.title: The project system should automatically update the equipment usage counter
entry.content:
My requirement is to update my equipment counter via PS network.
The confirmation should be the trigger for creating the measurement document.

My Equipment is a PRT and the Counter is Type V = Usage Counter. 

For Production Order it wokred perfectly fine, but now we need to create the mesaurment dosument via the PS System. 

Is this a standard SAP functionality?

#PRT #Usage Counter #Equipment #Project System

entry.title: We want to create a new sandbox server from MPM. Need gudance on DB steps
entry.content:
We have requirement of refreshing MPM data to a new sandbox environment. We are planning to go ahead with a VM restore of MPM and then change database files/name. Please guide us with the best possible option to carry out the task.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: MB51 / Zero stock and negative value after STO
entry.content:
Good day all, 

One of our clients did a STO between two plants, moving all his stock from plant A to plant B. 

After checking the MB51 report for the supplying plant he noticed that while the sum quantity is zero the sum value is negative. This also seems to create a conflict during the J1GVL_VL run giving the following indication: 

'' SAP remaining stock quantity differs from valuation quantity'' 

Any thoughts why the problem arises and how we can fix this? 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Background job status notifications
entry.content:
Hello SAP experts, I am in need of Your assistance.
I'm looking for how to set up an email notification with the status of a job.
Currently, we're on Basis Version 740

I have a job that we'll call BATCH_JOB, which runs every hour.
What I want to happen is to set up a notification that is sent to certain emails if the job fails.
I don't care about the spool list, just the status of the periodic job.

Does SAP have any built in tools for this, or would custom code be required?

entry.title: Moving a part of existing "On-Premise ECC" to "SAP S/4 HANA Cloud"
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a Production ECC System which is on EHP7 Non-Unicode.

It has 2 Production Work Clients - Clients A and B.

Client-A of it is being used for HR and GCS. 

Client-B is being used for Plant Maintenance, Finance and Quality Mgmt.

We are looking on the Option to move a part of one of the "Client-A only i.e. GCS to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud" whereas others will still be on On-Premise itself.

Please help with the possible Options/approaches in moving with this scenario from On-Premise ECC to SAP S/4 HANA Cloud without disturbing the others.

Thanks.

Regards,

Gowtham

entry.title: ABAP Programming Error LIST_TOPOFPAGE_OVERFLOW
entry.content:
We are encountering a strange issue where executing MFN1 generates multiple ABAP DUMP errors. However, no data errors are found when querying using KOB1.
We have reviewed relevant SAP notes but have not found a solution. Please refer to the attached file for more details and help.

entry.title: HANA DB PYTHON
entry.content:
We are currently in the process of upgrading our PERSON_NAME to 2.00.075.PHONE_NUMBER from 2.00.075.PHONE_NUMBER.
Our dev systems are already using 2.00.075, can you help to confirm the ff. inquiry:
1. Are we required to switch in python 3? current python version is 2
2. Can we still use python 2? If yes, is python2 still supported and until when?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: TRM Treasury: Movement interest expense (gross) with MZWST X "Calculate tax" to FI
entry.content:
In Treasury and Risk Management (TRM), there is a financial transaction in which the interest expense is taxed. The bank also creates an invoice for this with the net interest expense and the VAT amount on the interest expense. There are therefore 2 flows in TRM.

Actually, both transactions should now be posted in FI (transaction TBB1).

Our aim is that two flows (interest expense and tax) are shown in the cash flow in Treasury, but only one gross interest expense is sent to Accounting, so that only one document is created in Accounting and both accounts (interest expense, tax) are shown in one posting record based on the gross amount.

With the badi TPM_ACCIF_TRAC it is not possible to manipulate the amount transferred to FI.

An additional derived flow could perhaps be used to solve this (the actual interest flow is not sent to FI, only the derived flow, which is increased by the tax amount) - however, this derived flow is also mapped in the cash flow.
What other options are there to ensure that a posting record comes out in FI at the end: 40: Interest expense, 40 Tax ; 50 Treasury clearing account.

entry.title: Is it possible to group all open items into a single payment document?
entry.content:
Hi All,

I get the requirement from my users, they want to group all opened item into a single payment document via F110 automatic payment program. Even it include multiple vendor codes, they want to show one payment document only. So only one bank account will be credit. I can't find any setting or configuration in FBZP, most of them related to how to separate the payment into different clearing document.  

Debit: Vendor code

Credit: Bank account

 

Current testing result

entry.content:

entry.title: Forecast in MD04 remains even after we have deleted the CVC
entry.content:
Hi,

Demand is still showing in MD04 even after recreating the CVC and left the forecast blank.

Please let me know what needs to be done to clear demand from MD04?

Thanks
